judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent only summed Apple Music Canada revenue for two track_ids found via a narrow LIKE filter on title and an accented “Beyoncé” artist string, failing to perform the required entity resolution to include other duplicate records of "Get Me Bodied," thus undercounting the total.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent only summed Apple Music Canada revenue for two track_ids found via an exact artist match ('Beyoncé') in the tracks query (4233, 12954) and thus missed other duplicate entries of the same song, failing to perform the required entity resolution and leading to an undercount.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent only retrieved track_ids using a narrow LIKE filter (title LIKE '%Get Me Bodied%' AND artist LIKE '%Beyoncé%') and summed Apple Music Canada revenue for just those two IDs, missing other duplicate entries (e.g., with artist spelled 'Beyonce' or other variants), resulting in an undercount.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent only summed Apple Music Canada revenue for two track_ids found via a simple LIKE filter on title and the accented artist name "Beyoncé", failing to perform broader entity resolution to include other duplicate entries of the same song (e.g., unaccented "Beyonce" or different album entries), resulting in an undercount.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered tracks with title LIKE '%Get Me Bodied%' and artist LIKE '%Beyoncé%' (accent-sensitive), yielding only track_ids 4233 and 12954, and then summed Apple Music Canada revenue for just these IDs, thereby missing other duplicate records of the same song and undercounting the total (601.44 vs 1059.46).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
